chunks.text: ![U.S. flag](/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/US_Flag.png) ![Dot gov](/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/icon-dot-gov.svg) **The .gov means it’s official.** Federal government websites often end in .gov or .mil. Before sharing sensitive information, make sure you're on a federal government site. ![SSL](/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/icon-https.svg) **The site is secure.** The **https://** ensures that you are connecting to the official website and that any information you provide is encrypted and transmitted securely. ![U.S. Food and Drug Administration logo](/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/FDA_Logo_Icon_White.svg) ## Featured ## Products ## Topics ## Information For # Public Calendar: July 16-22, 2023 This public calendar is issued by the Food and Drug Administration. It lists significant meetings held by designated FDA policy makers with persons outside the executive branch of the federal government. #### Official Name: Robert M. Califf, M.D., MACC, Commissioner for Food and Drugs Event Date: 07/17/2023 Location: Silver Spring, MD **Subject: Obesity Treatments** Event Date: 07/17/2023 Location: Virtual **Subject: Nutrition Priorities** FDA Participant/Group: DAYLE CRISTINZIO; LAURA CARROLL; ROBIN MCKINNON; Non FDA Participant/Group: Several members of the American Medical Association Event Date: 07/18/2023 Location: Virtual **Subject: Milken Institute FasterCures Changemakers** FDA Participant/Group: DAYLE CRISTINZIO; Non FDA Participant/Group: Industry Event Date: 07/20/2023 Location: Virtual **Subject: Diversity in Clinical Trials** FDA Participant/Group: NAMANDJE BUMPUS; DAYLE CRISTINZIO; Non FDA Participant/Group: Industry, academia, media, and government Event Date: 07/20/2023 Location: Virtual **Subject: Pfizer Rocky Mount Facility** FDA Participant/Group: ANDREW ZACHER; JULIA TIERNEY; HILARY MARSTON; Non FDA Participant/Group: Albert Bourla (Pfizer); Event Date: 07/22/2023 Location: Virtual **Subject: Pfizer Rocky Mount Facility** FDA Participant/Group: ANDREW ZACHER; HILARY MARSTON; JULIA TIERNEY; Non FDA Participant/Group: Albert Bourla (Pfizer); #### Official Name: Janet Woodcock, M.D., Principal Deputy Commissioner No Significant Event #### Official Name: Andi Lipstein Fristedt, Deputy Commissioner for Policy, Legislation, and International Affairs No Significant Event #### Official Name: Jim Sigg, Deputy Commissioner for Operations No Significant Event #### Official Name: Mark Abdoo, Associate Commissioner for Global Policy and Strategy No Significant Event #### Official Name: Carol Cave, Acting Associate Commissioner for Regulatory Affairs No Significant Event #### Official Name: Heidi Rebello, Acting Associate Commissioner for External Affairs No Significant Event #### Official Name: Namandjé N. Bumpus, Ph.D., Chief Scientist No Significant Event #### Official Name: Patrizia Cavazzoni, M.D., Director, Center for Drug Evaluation and Research No Significant Event #### Official Name: Peter Marks, M.D., Ph.D., Director, Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research Event Date: 07/18/2023 Location: Washington, DC **Subject: National Student Leadership Conference at American University; Realizing the Promise of Gene Therapy in Humans** FDA Participant/Group: N/A Non FDA Participant/Group: Attendees of the National Student Leadership Conference at American University Event Date: 07/18/2023 Location: Virtual **Subject: Biocom California Meeting; Update on FDA's Cell and Gene Therapy Initiatives and Regulatory Policy Advancements** FDA Participant/Group: N/A Non FDA Participant/Group: Attendees of the Biocom California Meeting Event Date: 07/20/2023 Location: Washington, DC **Subject: Politico Live Meeting; The Next Generation of Health Care Therapies** FDA Participant/Group: N/A Non FDA Participant/Group: Attendees of the Politico Live Meeting; The Next Generation of Health Care Therapies #### Official Name: Jeffrey Shuren, M.D., J.D., Director, Center for Devices and Radiological Health No Significant Event #### Official Name: Donald Prater, Acting Director, Center for Food Safety and Applied Nutrition

Location: Washington, DC **Subject: Politico Live Meeting; The Next Generation of Health Care Therapies** FDA Participant/Group: N/A Non FDA Participant/Group: Attendees of the Politico Live Meeting; The Next Generation of Health Care Therapies #### Official Name: Jeffrey Shuren, M.D., J.D., Director, Center for Devices and Radiological Health No Significant Event #### Official Name: Donald Prater, Acting Director, Center for Food Safety and Applied Nutrition Event Date: 07/17/2023 Location: Toronto, Canada **Subject: International Association for Food Protection Annual Meeting; Update on Human Foods Program** FDA Participant/Group: MARK MOORMAN; Non FDA Participant/Group: Industry, regulatory, and other stakeholders Event Date: 07/19/2023 Location: Virtual **Subject: Health Chemicals Coalition Meeting** FDA Participant/Group: STEVE HERMANSKY; SUSAN LAINE; JESSICA ROWDEN; ELISABETH DAVIS; GRACE KIM; STEVEN MUSSER; KRISTI MULDOON JACOBS; KARI BARRETT; KRISTINE BUTLER; PAUL SOUTH; DOUGLAS STEARN; Non FDA Participant/Group: Jane Houlihan, Charlotte Brody (Healthy Babies Bright Futures ); Tom Neltner, Carrie Murton, Joanne Staney, Liora Fikse (Environmental Defense Fund); Thomas Galligan, Jensen Jose (Center for Science in the Public Interest); Tunde Akinieye, Michael Hansen (Consumer Reports); Scott Faber, Melanie Benesh, Lillian Zhou (Environmental Working Group); Jaydee Hansen (Center for Food Safety); #### Official Name: Brian King, Ph.D., Director, Center for Tobacco Products Event Date: 07/18/2023 Location: Virtual **Subject: Introductory Meeting** FDA Participant/Group: Several FDA staff Non FDA Participant/Group: Several representatives from Smoke Free Alternatives Trade Association (SFATA) #### Official Name: Tracey H. Forfa, J.D., Director, Center for Veterinary Medicine No Significant Event #### Official Name: Tucker Patterson, Ph.D., Director, National Center for Toxicological Research No Significant Event #### Official Name: Mark Raza, J.D., Chief Counsel No Significant Event ## Content current as of: 08/03/2023 ![Food and Drug Administration Logo](/themes/custom/preview/assets/images/FDA_Logo_Icon_White.svg)
